content: Kenney.nl pixel platformer packs are CC0 (public domain, no attribution required, commercial OK). Pixel Platformer = 18x18 tiles, 200+ assets, PNG. Packs ship both a combined PNG spritesheet (e.g. tilemap_packed.png at fixed tile grid) AND individual PNG tiles, plus sometimes Tiled/XML data. CC0 means free to recolor/darken for grunge palette. itch.io mirror exists (kenney-assets.itch.io). For Kaplay use sliceX/sliceY on the packed sheet matching the tile grid.
